items.hook: The New Mutants are a group of mutant superheroes appearing in American comic books published by Marvel Comics, generally in association with the X-Men.
items.body: Originally depicted as the teenaged junior class at the Xavier Institute, subsequent stories have depicted the characters as adult superheroes or as teachers and mentors to younger mutants. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Seinfeld actor apologises to reality star for 'inappropriate' sketch when she was 17
items.body: Jason Alexander said he "truly regrets" the Funny Or Die sketch he appeared in with Courtney Stodden.

items.hook: It was an integral part of the Donbas–Rostov Strategic Defensive Operation.
items.body: The Donbas Operation was a frontline defensive operation of the Soviet Red Army in the territory of Donbas on the Eastern Front of the Second World War in Europe. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: Toldos Aharon is a devout, insular, fervently anti-Zionist ultra orthodox Hasidic dynasty.
items.body: The group is characterized by extreme conservatism and a desire to preserve the life of the old Yishuv in Jerusalem, in sharp opposition to Zionism, in a strict Haredi way of life, in a special style of clothing, and in an emphasis on prayer at a moderate pace

items.hook: Isidro Corbinos Pantoque was a Spanish footballer who played as a midfielder for FC Barcelona in the mid-1910s.

items.hook: Archibald Thorburn FZS was a Scottish artist who specialised in wildlife, painting mostly in watercolour.
items.body: He explored Scotland to sketch birds in the wild, his favourite haunt being the Forest of Gaick near Kingussie in Inverness-shire. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Former River City actor Iain Robertson jailed for nine years for rape
items.body: The 45-year-old, played Stevie O'Hara in the BBC soap, was convicted of five offences against the women between 2004 and 2019.
